response.justification: Strong individual contributor with 15+ years of software development experience and genuine craftsmanship orientation (TDD, CI/CD, testing infrastructure, developer tooling). However, the role requires 2+ years of formal people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, neither of which is evidenced on the resume — all listed roles are IC titles (Senior/Staff Software Engineer/Developer) with no reports, hiring, or performance-management experience. Mobile platform ecosystem exposure is also thin (brief iOS/Apple TV work in 2015-2016). The candidate matches the technical-depth side of the JD but misses the core people-leadership requirement.
strengths: 15+ years of engineering experience with strong testing/tooling orientation (TDD, CI/CD, test runners, Selenium courses)
Demonstrable developer-tools work: built Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators, CI infrastructure
Teaching and community-building track record (workshops, dojos, courses) suggests mentoring aptitude
concerns: No evidence of direct people management — no reports, no performance reviews, no hiring experience mentioned
No formal technical leadership title (tech lead, staff+ with scope, EM); all roles are IC
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem depth — only ~1 year of iOS/Apple TV work nearly a decade ago

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
